user_prompt: Triage this ticket: 'My account got charged twice this month, please refund the duplicate.'
actual_output:
Priority: HIGH
Category: Billing - Duplicate Charge
Flag: Verify transaction history in Stripe/Billing portal

Draft response:

Hi there,

I am so sorry to hear that you've been charged twice this month. I completely understand how concerning that is, and I want to get this sorted out for you immediately.

I am currently looking into your account billing history to verify the duplicate transaction. 

1. If I confirm the duplicate charge, I will initiate a refund for the second transaction right away.
2. You should see the funds returned to your original payment method within 5-10 business days, depending on your bank.

Could you please confirm the last four digits of the card that was charged? This will help me ensure I'm looking at the correct transaction.

I'll update you as soon as I have confirmation.

Best,

Compass
Support Team
judge_reasoning: The chatbot correctly followed its instructions to triage the ticket, categorize it, and draft an empathetic response addressing the user's billing issue.
